# Copilot Instructions for Finalsite 2025 Goals & Mission

<!-- Use this file to provide workspace-specific custom instructions to Copilot. For more details, visit https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/copilot-customization#_use-a-githubcopilotinstructionsmd-file -->

## Project Overview
This is a Next.js web application showcasing Finalsite's goals and mission for 2025. The project uses modern web development practices with React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and the Next.js App Router.

## Development Guidelines

### Technologies Used
- **Framework**: Next.js 15 with App Router
- **Language**: TypeScript for type safety
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS for utility-first styling
- **UI Components**: Custom components with modern design patterns
- **Animations**: Smooth transitions and micro-interactions

### Code Standards
- Use TypeScript for all components and utilities
- Follow React best practices with functional components and hooks
- Implement responsive design with Tailwind CSS breakpoints
- Use semantic HTML elements for accessibility
- Apply modern CSS patterns (flexbox, grid, custom properties)
- Optimize for performance with Next.js features (Image, Link, etc.)

### UI/UX Guidelines
- Focus on clean, professional design suitable for a corporate website
- Implement dark/light mode toggle
- Use consistent spacing and typography
- Apply smooth animations for better user experience
- Ensure accessibility standards are met
- Make the design responsive across all device sizes

### Component Structure
- Create reusable components in `src/components/`
- Use TypeScript interfaces for component props
- Implement proper error handling and loading states
- Follow naming conventions (PascalCase for components, camelCase for functions)

### Finalsite Context
- Finalsite is a technology company serving educational institutions
- Focus on innovation, growth, and impact in education technology
- Emphasize modern, forward-thinking approach for 2025 goals
- Highlight mission-driven work and community impact
